title: Node 24, TypeScript 7, ESM, Dependencies, and Clean Reproduction · Narrowing Workshop
summary: A disability-led research network incrementally builds reproducible TypeScript feed-service repository from original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and browser fixtures while retaining prior TypeScript, Node, HTTP-client, Express, SQL, Git, accessibility, security, testing, async-cleanup, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of reproducible TypeScript feed-service repository while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction,…
objectives: Pin Node 24.18.0, TypeScript 7.0.2 plus the TypeScript 6.0.2 compatibility surface, ESM semantics, package manager, and platform matrix.
Pin Express 5.2.1, pg 8.22.0, fast-xml-parser 5.10.0, Zod 4.4.3, Pino 10.3.1, PostgreSQL 18.4, and migration tooling from reviewed sources.
Bind strict source, configuration, generated migrations or schemas, source maps, emitted JavaScript, package exports, and startup entry.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Runtime Contract
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop TypeScript team handles case 9691 during a PostgreSQL lease and migration fault exercise. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile Node, TypeScript, dependency, emitted-package, and clean-reproduction evidence; every external value must remain unknown until current runtime validation admits it; then change one RSS, Atom, namespace, entity, date, identity, or runtime-validation case and reconcile provenance. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Runtime Contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for pin node 24.18.0, typescript 7.0.2 plus the typescript 6.0.2 compatibility surface, esm semantics, package manager, and platform matrix. For Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Feed Ts Runtime Contract, keep Feed Ts Runtime Contract connected to executable TypeScript unknown-validation, async, PostgreSQL, Express, reader, package, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
